summary: Comprehensive testing of BarberHub payment flow completed. All features working correctly. Backend APIs 100% success rate. Frontend registration, plan selection, payment, and dashboard flows all working as expected.
passed_tests: API health check (/api/)
Plans API returns both plans with correct prices (/api/plans)
User registration returns needs_payment=true for new barbers
Login for barber without barbershop returns needs_payment=true
Barbershop creation via /api/barbershops
Subscription creation in demo mode (/api/subscription/create)
Barbershop activation (/api/barbershops/activate)
Complete registration to activation flow (end-to-end)
Login with active barbershop returns needs_payment=false
Landing page loads correctly with BarberHub branding
Registration page form elements visible and functional
Registration redirects to /escolher-plano
Select Plan page shows both plans (Comum R$49,90 and Premium R$99,90)
Plan selection and continue to payment works
Payment page shows barbershop data and payment data fields
Payment submission creates barbershop and activates subscription
Dashboard loads after successful payment
Login page elements visible and functional
User without barbershop redirected to /escolher-plano after login
Protected routes (/dashboard) redirect to /escolher-plano for users without barbershop
seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefix 'TEST_' or 'test_' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment flow fully tested and working. Flow: Register -> /escolher-plano -> /pagamento -> /dashboard. Demo mode active (Mercado Pago not configured). All redirect logic working correctly for users with/without barbershop.
mocked_api_note: MOCKED: Mercado Pago payment integration is in demo mode - does not redirect to external payment URL, directly activates barbershop

registration_flow.details: User registration creates account, returns needs_payment=true, redirects to /escolher-plano

plan_selection.details: Both plans displayed correctly (Comum R$49,90, Premium R$99,90), selection works, redirects to /pagamento

payment_page.details: Shows barbershop data fields (name, phone, address, GPS), payment data fields (name, email, CPF), payment method selection (PIX/Card)

barbershop_creation.details: Barbershop created via /api/barbershops with pending status

subscription_creation.details: Subscription created via /api/subscription/create in demo mode

barbershop_activation.details: Barbershop activated via /api/barbershops/activate, plan_status changes to 'active'

login_redirect.details: Users without barbershop redirected to /escolher-plano, users with barbershop go to /dashboard

protected_routes.details: Users without barbershop cannot access /dashboard, redirected to /escolher-plano
